Note that the number of square tiles in the pattern in Fig. 2.4 leads to
the sequence 1, 3, 5, 7, ... in which the difference of consecutive terms
is the constant 2. The slope of the line representing the linear
relationship between the term number and the number of square tiles is
y = 2x - 1 is 2. Hence, the slope
e represents the constant difference
between consecutive terms of the sequence.
